    A

    addCommand(String) - Method in class com.server.CommandHistory
    Adds a command to the history.
    AddElement() - Method in class com.utils.Invoker
    Adds a new element to the collection by prompting the user for all field values.
    AddElementCommand - Class in com.commands
    Command implementation for adding a new music band to the collection.
    AddElementCommand() - Constructor for class com.commands.AddElementCommand
     
    AddIfMin() - Method in class com.utils.Invoker
    Adds a new element to the collection only if its ID is less than the minimum ID in the collection.
    AddIfMinCommand - Class in com.commands
    Command implementation for adding a new music band only if its ID is less than the minimum.
    AddIfMinCommand() - Constructor for class com.commands.AddIfMinCommand
     
    addToHistory(String) - Method in class com.utils.MinHeap
    Adds a command to the command history.
    Album - Class in com.model
    Represents an album with a name and sales figure.
    Album(String, Double) - Constructor for class com.model.Album
    Constructs a new Album with the specified name and sales figure.
    App - Class in com
    Main entry point for the Music Band Collection application.
    App() - Constructor for class com.App
     
    AppTest - Class in com.example
    Unit test for simple App.
    AppTest(String) - Constructor for class com.example.AppTest
    Create the test case
    AsyncClient - Class in com.client.network
    Non-blocking TCP client for connecting to the server.
    AsyncClient(String, int) - Constructor for class com.client.network.AsyncClient
    Creates a new client that will connect to the specified server.
    AsyncServer - Class in com.server.network
    Non-blocking TCP server using Java NIO (New I/O).
    AsyncServer(int) - Constructor for class com.server.network.AsyncServer
    Creates a new server on the specified port.
    available() - Method in class com.utils.ScriptInputStream
    Returns an estimate of the number of bytes that can be read from the input stream without blocking.
    AverageParticipants() - Method in class com.utils.Invoker
    Calculates and displays the average value of the numberOfParticipants field across all elements in the collection.
    AverageParticipantsCommand - Class in com.commands
    Command implementation for calculating the average number of participants.
    AverageParticipantsCommand() - Constructor for class com.commands.AverageParticipantsCommand
